summary: The provided keyframes show a kitchen counter and appliances, but no clear view of any windows; therefore the red object below the windows cannot be determined from these frames.

payload.answer: Insufficient evidence — the windows are not visible in the provided keyframes, so I can’t determine what red object is below them.
supporting_claims: No windows are shown in frames 0 or 2; only the kitchen counter and appliances are visible.

uncertainties: No windows are visible in the provided keyframes, so there’s no way to locate what is ‘below the windows’.
A red object is visible (a red cereal box) on the counter, but it is not shown relative to any windows, so it may not be the intended answer.
